integration: Zephyr Scale Cloud API (Bearer) or Zephyr for Jira — demo export when API unavailable

test_cases.title: User successfully logs in with valid credentials

steps.expected: Login page loads successfully with email and password fields visible

steps.action: Enter valid email address in the email field
steps.expected: Email field is populated with the entered email

steps.action: Enter valid password in the password field
steps.expected: Password field shows masked characters, login button becomes enabled
User is redirected to dashboard page, welcome message displays with user's name
User profile icon is visible in header, logout option is available

test_cases.title: User logs in with valid credentials and special characters in password

steps.expected: Login page loads successfully with email and password fields visible

steps.action: Enter valid email address in the email field
steps.expected: Email field is populated with the entered email

steps.action: Enter valid password with special characters in the password field
steps.expected: Password field shows masked characters, login button becomes enabled
User is redirected to dashboard page, welcome message displays with user's name
User profile icon is visible in header, logout option is available

test_cases.title: User fails to log in with invalid password

steps.expected: Login page loads successfully with email and password fields visible

steps.action: Enter valid email address in the email field
steps.expected: Email field is populated with the entered email

steps.action: Enter invalid password in the password field
steps.expected: Password field shows masked characters, login button becomes enabled
Error message is displayed, user is not logged in
Error message indicates invalid password

test_cases.title: User fails to log in with invalid email address

steps.expected: Login page loads successfully with email and password fields visible

steps.action: Enter invalid email address in the email field
steps.expected: Email field is populated with the entered email

steps.action: Enter valid password in the password field
steps.expected: Password field shows masked characters, login button becomes enabled
Error message is displayed, user is not logged in
Error message indicates invalid email address

test_cases.title: User attempts to log in with maximum length password

steps.expected: Login page loads successfully with email and password fields visible

steps.action: Enter valid email address in the email field
steps.expected: Email field is populated with the entered email

steps.action: Enter password with maximum length in the password field
steps.expected: Password field shows masked characters, login button becomes enabled
User is redirected to dashboard page, welcome message displays with user's name
User profile icon is visible in header, logout option is available
